name: Halloween Jack-o-Lantern Frosties
recipeIngredient: 8 oz vanilla yogurt or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare decorations using marshmallows, silver decors, colored candies, gumdrops, green-colored cherries, or pineapple.
2. Cut a thin slice of peel from the bottom of each orange to prevent it from rolling.
3. Slice off the top 1/3 of each orange.
4. Scoop out the inside with the knife and grapefruit spoon.
5. Put the pulp and juice (minus seeds) into the blender.
6. Add the yogurt and blend well.
7. Decorate the orange like a Jack-O-Lantern.
8. Cut a hole in the "cap" and insert a straw.
9. Pour the drink from the blender into the Jack-O-Lantern cups and serve. Enjoy!
